hero.title: Who We Serve
hero.description: We serve everyone looking for faster, cheaper, and cleaner transportation. From large corporations to individuals, our solutions are designed to fit everyone.

sustainable.title: Driving Towards a
sustainable.description: VEGO is committed to revolutionizing transportation in Saudi Arabia. By providing eco-friendly electric mobility solutions, we are helping businesses and individuals reduce their carbon footprint while improving operational efficiency.

delivery-companies.title: Delivery Companies
delivery-companies.description: We provide electric bikes specialized for daily operations, featuring smart boxes, refrigeration options, and precise tracking systems for faster and more efficient delivery.

logistics-fleets.title: Logistics & Transport Fleets
logistics-fleets.description: The "My VEGO" program for fleet management allows you to monitor vehicle performance, track maintenance, and manage charging all from a single dashboard.

individuals-couriers.title: Individuals & Couriers
individuals-couriers.description: Practical and economical electric bikes, ideal for daily commutes or independent delivery work, offering a cost-effective and green alternative.

municipalities-urban.title: Municipalities & Urban Projects
municipalities-urban.description: Micromobility solutions for cities, residential complexes, and universities. We support sustainability goals and help reduce urban traffic congestion.

restaurants-stores.title: Restaurants & Stores
restaurants-stores.description: Smart electric bikes designed for daily delivery needs, combining efficiency and economy while highlighting your brand’s commercial identity in a sustainable way.

hero.title: Our Branches
hero.description: VEGO starts from the Kingdom to the world, leading the future of electric mobility with smart and sustainable solutions. From our headquarters in Riyadh to our regional and international branches, we continue to expand our presence to deliver our products and services globally.

branches.title: Where We Operate
branches.description: Our network spans regional and international hubs designed to keep VEGO closer to our partners, customers, and supply chains.

cta.title: Connecting the Future of Electric Mobility
cta.description: Our network is growing every day. We are establishing new hubs and service centers across major trade routes to ensure seamless support for our customers worldwide.

hero.title: Vision for a Sustainable Future
hero.subtitle: Transforming Global Mobility Future
hero.description: VEGO Group was founded in 2020 in Saudi Arabia with a clear mission: to transform how the world deals with transportation. With growing environmental concerns and the need for sustainable solutions, we recognized the opportunity to make a real difference. From our humble beginnings, our commitment has always been to lead the industry in clean and innovative transportation technologies that not only reduce carbon emissions but also improve the quality of life in communities around the world.

missionVision.title: Our Mission & Vision
missionVision.subtitle: Driven by purpose and guided by a sustainable future

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At VEGO Group, our mission is to deliver sustainable and innovative mobility solutions that move the industry forward and contribute to a cleaner, greener world. We believe that through our commitment to excellence, we can create a future where transportation is not only efficient and accessible, but also environmentally responsible.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Our vision is to lead the global transition toward clean energy mobility by continuously pushing the boundaries of innovation and technology. We aspire to set the benchmark for sustainability in the industry, ensuring our products are not only technologically advanced, but also contribute to a better future for the planet and its people.

values.title: The principles that guide everything we do
values.description: These core values define who we are and how we operate

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Continuous innovation in design, technology, and customer experience

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Commitment to environmental protection and reducing carbon emissions

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: The highest quality and safety standards in all our products

customer-focus.title: Customer Focus
customer-focus.description: Putting customers first and exceeding their expectations

journey.title: Our Story
journey.subtitle: A Vision for a Sustainable Future
journey.description:
VEGO Group was founded in 2020 in Saudi Arabia with a clear mission: to transform the way the world approaches transportation. With growing environmental concerns and the need for sustainable solutions, we recognized the opportunity to make a real difference. From our humble beginnings, our commitment has always been to lead the industry in clean and innovative transportation technologies that not only reduce carbon emissions but also improve quality of life in communities worldwide.

Our journey began with the development of the first electric bikes and smart operating systems that push the boundaries of what is possible in mobility. Today, VEGO Group stands at the forefront of the clean energy revolution, dedicating its efforts to shaping the future of transportation.

leadership.title: Meet Our Inspiring Leaders
leadership.description: A team of experts and pioneers leading the journey of excellence and innovation

abdulaziz.name: Abdulaziz Al-Subaie
abdulaziz.bio: Holder of an MBA degree, co-founder of several companies specializing in industry, import, export, logistics and supply chains...

abdullahS.name: Abdullah Al-Subaie
abdullahS.role: Chairman of the Board | Partner & Co-Founder
abdullahS.bio: Saudi entrepreneur with ambitious vision and high expertise in trade and e-commerce...

abdullahSa.name: Abdullah Salah
abdullahSa.role: Executive Committee and International Relations Advisor
abdullahSa.bio: A graduate of the University of Jordan in 1996, majoring in Business Administration. He is a founder and partner in several companies and factories across the Arab world...

sara.name: Sara Alotaibi
sara.bio: Marketing manager with more than 8 years of experience in advertising campaigns and digital marketing. Specialized in building effective marketing strategies, developing impactful partnerships, and executing campaigns that drive brand growth and sales.

alaa.name: Ala Jebrin
alaa.bio: Strategic expert and engineer with more than 15 years of experience driving growth and expansion. He combines technical understanding with hands-on execution, supported by leadership experience at global companies including Zain, Huawei, and Uber.

abdullahQ.name: Eng. Abdullah Qandas
abdullahQ.bio: A specialized and certified engineer in electric vehicles with more than 7 years of experience in developing and advancing electric mobility technologies. He has contributed to innovative solutions that support sustainability and strengthen the future of smart mobility.

sustainability.title: Our Innovative Solutions
sustainability.subtitle: At VEGO Group, we provide advanced solutions designed to enhance both mobility and efficiency.

electricBikes.title: VEGO Electric Bikes
electricBikes.description: Representing the next generation of smart mobility, VEGO electric bikes combine performance, efficiency, and advanced technology. Made in Saudi Arabia with a modern identity, they serve delivery companies and individuals seeking an economical and eco-friendly transportation solution. Every VEGO bike reflects a vision for sustainable, efficient urban mobility, offering a comfortable and safe ride, with advanced technical specifications to ensure long-lasting and reliable performance.

deliverySolutions.title: Delivery Solutions
deliverySolutions.description: At VEGO, we provide a complete ecosystem of smart delivery solutions designed to meet the needs of companies and couriers efficiently and sustainably. From electric bikes equipped with smart and refrigerated boxes, to fast charging systems and fleet management via the My VEGO platform, every element is designed to make delivery operations faster, cost-effective, and smarter. Our solutions combine technology and sustainability to reduce operational costs, improve service quality, and support the transition towards an eco-friendly delivery sector, with accurate reporting to optimize performance and resource management.

micromobility.title: Micromobility
micromobility.description: Micromobility represents the future of urban transportation, providing smart and eco-friendly solutions that help reduce congestion and emissions. At VEGO, we offer a comprehensive system of electric bikes and scooters designed to meet the needs of individuals and companies for fast city mobility. VEGO's micromobility solutions redefine urban travel with higher efficiency, greater flexibility, and a more sustainable experience, supporting shared mobility and integration with smart city infrastructure.

chargingSystems.title: Charging Systems
chargingSystems.description: At VEGO, we offer integrated charging solutions suitable for all operational needs, from individual use to large fleets. Our smart systems ensure fast charging, energy efficiency, and seamless integration with all our mobility solutions. With precise monitoring and advanced performance analytics, clients can ensure operational continuity, reduce downtime, and maximize the benefits of clean energy for a sustainable and reliable operation model.

cta.title: Be part of the sustainable transportation movement
cta.description: Together, we can create cleaner cities and a healthier planet. Join thousands of satisfied customers who have already made the switch.

commitment-to-excellence.title: Commitment to Excellence
commitment-to-excellence.quality-assurance-desc: Our products meet the highest industry standards and undergo rigorous testing to ensure safety and reliability.
commitment-to-excellence.customer-service-desc: Our relationship extends beyond the purchase, with dedicated support and effective after-sales care.

hero.title: Terms and Conditions
hero.description: Welcome to the Vego Group website and services. By accessing and using our website, My Vego App, or any of our services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before using our products and services.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: These Terms and Conditions govern your use of the Vego Group website, products, and services, including the My Vego App, and apply to all users, including visitors, customers, and partners.
By using our website or services, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree with these terms, you must not use our website or services.

use-of-services.title: 2. Use of the Website and Services

eligibility.label: Eligibility
eligibility.description: You must be at least 18 years old to use our services. By using our services, you represent that you are of legal age.

license.label: License
license.description: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use our website and services for personal, non-commercial purposes.

prohibited.label: Prohibited Activities
prohibited.description: You agree not to misuse our services, including but not limited to:

prohibited-list: Attempting to hack or disrupt our systems.
Using our services for any illegal or unauthorized purposes.
Violating any applicable laws while using our services.

vehicles.label: Electric Vehicles
vehicles.description: Vego Group offers electric cars and motorcycles designed to enhance urban mobility and reduce environmental impact. By purchasing and using these vehicles, you agree to follow all applicable driving and safety regulations in your country or region.

smart-os.label: Smart OS
smart-os.description: Our vehicles are equipped with a smart operating system that integrates real-time updates, navigation, and personalized settings to improve your driving experience. Vego Group is not liable for any navigation errors or system failures.

sadiq-app.label: My Vego App
sadiq-app.description: The My Vego App provides delivery drivers with tools to maximize efficiency and income. Vego Group is not responsible for earnings or delivery outcomes, as they depend on driver performance and market demand.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.description: All prices for products and services are displayed on our website and are subject to change without prior notice.

payment.label: Payment
payment.description: You agree to pay for any products or services you purchase through our website or My Vego App. Payment details must be accurate and complete.

refunds.label: Refunds and Cancellations
refunds.description: All sales are final unless otherwise specified. For refund and cancellation policies, please contact us at info@vego.sa.

products.label: Products Warranty
products.description: Vego Group guarantees that its products meet the highest industry standards and have undergone rigorous testing. However, we do not provide any warranty beyond those legally required unless expressly stated.

service.label: Service Disclaimer
service.description: While we strive to provide uninterrupted access to our website and services, we do not guarantee that they will always be available or free from errors or interruptions.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.description: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Vego Group shall not be held liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our products or services, including but not limited to:
items: Damage to your vehicle or personal property.

intellectual-property.title: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectual-property.description: All content on the Vego Group website, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the intellectual property of Vego Group or its licensors. You may not use, reproduce, or distribute any content without our prior written permission.

third-party-links.title: 8. Third-Party Links
third-party-links.description: Our website and services may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by Vego Group. We are not responsible for the content, policies, or practices of any third-party sites.

termination.title: 9. Termination
termination.description: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your access to our website or services at any time, without notice, for any reason, including violation of these Terms and Conditions.

governing-law.title: 10. Governing Law
governing-law.description: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Any disputes arising from the use of our website or services shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

changes.title: 11. Changes to the Terms and Conditions
changes.description: We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and your continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

contact.title: 12. Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:

hero.title: How Vego Group Protects Your Data
hero.description: This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our website, app, or services related to electric bike sharing and fast charging.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: Vego Group is committed to protecting the privacy of its users and handling personal data in line with operational needs, security standards, and applicable legal requirements in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
highlights: Account, location, and usage data are processed to operate the service efficiently.
We do not sell your personal information to any third party.
You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data in accordance with applicable regulations.

account.label: Account Information
account.description: Name, email address, phone number, and password.

location.label: Location Information
location.description: Used to identify the nearest battery locker or charging station to you.

device.label: Device Information
device.description: Device type, operating system, and IP address.

usage.label: Usage Data
usage.description: Your trip history, usage duration, and stations visited.

payment.label: Payment Information
payment.description: Bank card details or other payment methods, processed securely through approved payment service providers.

how-we-use-information.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
bullets: Operate electric bike sharing services, battery lockers, and fast charging stations.
Improve user experience and develop our services.
Send notifications related to your account, trips, or promotional offers.
Comply with legal and regulatory requirements in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
Maintain platform security and prevent fraud.

third-parties.title: 3. Sharing Information with Third Parties
third-parties.description: We do not sell your personal information to any third party. We may share your data only when operationally or legally required.

providers.label: Service Providers
providers.description: Payment partners, cloud service providers, and analytics companies, solely for operating our services.

government.label: Government Authorities
government.description: When legally requested or required to comply with regulations in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

admins.label: Administrative Users (Admins)
admins.description: Authorized Vego administrators may access user data within their defined permissions for service management.

data-security.title: 4. Data Security
data-security.description: We take appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.
bullets: Encrypting data in transit using HTTPS.
Restricting data access to authorized personnel only.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience on our platform, and you can manage them through your browser settings.
bullets: Analyzing usage patterns to improve the service.
Disabling some cookies may affect site functionality.

your-rights.title: 6. Your Rights
your-rights.description: You have the right to exercise several rights related to your personal data at any time.
bullets: Access the personal data we hold about you.
Delete your account and data in accordance with applicable regulations.
Unsubscribe from marketing messages at any time.

retention.title: 7. Data Retention
retention.description: We retain your data for as long as your account remains active, and after closure for the period required by law or necessary operational purposes.

children-privacy.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children-privacy.description: Our services are not directed to persons under the age of 18. If we learn that we have collected data from a minor without parental consent, we will delete it immediately.

policy-updates.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
policy-updates.description: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by email or through a notice on our platform. Your continued use of our services after an update means you accept the revised policy.

contact.title: 10. Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions or complaints related to this policy, please contact us through the following channels.

footer.description: Leading the electric revolution with innovative, sustainable, and high-perforance electric vehicles. Join us in creating a cleaner, greener future.

not-found.not-found-desc: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist

hero.subtitle: Saudi Arabia's First Electric Mobility Company
hero.title: Innovating the Future of Electric Mobility
hero.description: Integrated solutions combining technology, design, and sustainability to make every journey smarter, cleaner, and more efficient.

who-is-vego.title: Who is VEGO?
who-is-vego.description: The first Saudi company specialized in manufacturing electric mobility solutions globally. Our products include electric motorcycles, smart bikes and scooters, fast charging systems, and the my vego fleet management program, all within one integrated ecosystem.

why-vego-group.title: Why VEGO Group?
why-vego-group.description: Because we innovate the future of electric mobility with solutions that combine technology, design, and sustainability to make every journey smarter, cleaner, and more efficient.
why-vego-group.customer-focus-desc: We craft mobility experiences that stay close to what our customers need most.
why-vego-group.commitment-to-sustainability-desc: Electric solutions that cut emissions and build a cleaner future.
why-vego-group.advanced-technology-desc: Smart innovation that boosts performance and reliability.

what-we-offer.title: What We Offer
what-we-offer.micromobility-desc: A smart urban mobility system using foldable e-bikes and e-scooters to ease short trips and reduce congestion.
what-we-offer.delivery-solutions-desc: Integrated delivery solutions with e-bikes equipped with smart, cooled boxes to ensure fast, efficient delivery.
what-we-offer.electric-motorcycles-desc: Smart electric motorcycles that blend high performance with modern design for smooth, eco-friendly city rides.
what-we-offer.charging-systems-desc: Fast, advanced charging stations that ensure a safe, efficient charging experience for individuals and businesses.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.description: Quick answers to the most common questions.

erp.title: Getting Started with ERP: A Comprehensive Guide
erp.summary: Learn the basics of ERP systems and how they can transform your business operations.

cloud.title: Cloud ERP vs On-Premise: Which is Right for You?
cloud.summary: Compare the pros and cons of cloud-based and on-premise ERP solutions.

implementation.title: ERP Implementation Best Practices
implementation.summary: Discover key strategies and best practices for successful ERP implementation.

hero.title: Our Products
hero.subtitle: A refined collection of electric mobility solutions crafted for performance, elegance, and sustainability.

electric-motorcycles.title: Electric Vehicles
electric-motorcycles.description: The ultimate generation of electric transport combines intelligence, modern technologies, and innovative design to create a leading Saudi industry. VEGO electric motorcycles carry a sustainable future vision powered by smart technology to support the future of intelligent mobility.

delivery-solutions.title: Smart Delivery Solutions
delivery-solutions.intro-1: At VEGO, we provide an integrated ecosystem of intelligent delivery solutions designed to meet the needs of companies and delivery personnel with efficiency and sustainability.
delivery-solutions.intro-2: From electric bicycles equipped with smart and refrigerated boxes, to fast charging systems and fleet management through the My VEGO platform—every element is designed to make delivery operations faster, more economical, and smarter.
delivery-solutions.intro-3: Our solutions combine technology and sustainability to reduce operational costs and enhance service quality, supporting the transformation towards an eco-friendly delivery sector.

micromobility.title: Micromobility Solutions
micromobility.intro-1: Micromobility represents the future of urban transportation, offering smart and eco-friendly solutions that help reduce congestion and lower emissions.
micromobility.intro-2: At VEGO, we provide an integrated ecosystem of electric bikes and scooters designed to meet the needs of individuals and businesses for fast, efficient urban mobility.
micromobility.intro-3: VEGO's micromobility solutions redefine city travel with greater efficiency, flexibility, and a more sustainable experience.

charging-systems.title: Charging Systems
charging-systems.intro-1: At VEGO, we provide comprehensive charging solutions designed to meet a wide range of operational needs, from individual use to large fleets.
charging-systems.intro-2: Our charging systems include three main methods:
charging-systems.home-desc: Safe and convenient charging from any standard electrical outlet, ideal for daily personal use.
charging-systems.fast-desc: Advanced stations that deliver high-speed charging in record time.
charging-systems.swap-desc: Innovative technology that allows replacing a depleted battery with a fully charged one in seconds, ensuring uninterrupted operation.
charging-systems.summary: VEGO’s charging systems are designed to provide flexibility, speed, and sustainability for every journey.

hero.title: Vego Group Blogs
hero.description: Latest news, updates, and achievements in electric mobility and sustainable solutions

hero.title: Get in Touch with VEGO
hero.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out for any inquiries or support.

intro.title: Contact Us with Confidence
intro.description: We are here to support you and provide <bold>smart solutions</bold> that keep up with the future of mobility and technology.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.description: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you shortly.
form.name: Full Name

test-drive.title: Experience VEGO products before you decide
test-drive.description: Share your details, pick the day, time, and product that fits you, and we will arrange a smooth, polished VEGO test ride around your schedule.
test-drive.heroNote: Pick the day, time, and product that fits you, and we will line up a fast, polished test drive around your schedule.
test-drive.statsLabel: Fast booking flow with a polished interface
test-drive.benefitsDescription: This page is built to feel premium and direct: clear product selection, quick scheduling, and a layout that matches the VEGO visual language.
test-drive.formDescription: Fill out the form and choose the product you want to try. We use these details only to arrange and confirm your test drive booking.
test-drive.productPlaceholder: Choose the product you want to ride
test-drive.quickNoteDescription: After submission, we will review your preferred slot and contact you quickly to confirm the booking.
test-drive.successMessage: Your test drive request has been received successfully.

benefits.title: Product selection that feels premium
benefits.description: Instead of a dull dropdown, the product choice is presented as polished cards that make every model easier to scan.

benefits.title: Fast booking with no visual clutter
benefits.description: The fields are arranged for quick completion, with clear grouping for personal details, scheduling, and product choice.

benefits.title: Built around VEGO brand colors
benefits.description: Primary and secondary colors drive the layout and the motion, so the page feels consistent with the rest of the site.
